response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a performance of 'Bishoujo Muzai♡Pirates' by Houshou Marine. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics. 3. Extracted lyrics and mapped to the performance scene. 4. Verified metadata for song title, artist, and language.
response.global_summary: A concert video performance of Houshou Marine's original song "Bishoujo Muzai♡Pirates" (Beautiful Girl Innocence♡Pirates) performed by Houshou Marine herself, with high-energy choreography and audience interaction.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Bishoujo Muzai♡Pirates' begins with Houshou Marine on stage. High-energy dance, audience cheering with glowsticks. Song metadata is not explicitly on screen, but the performance is identified as 'Bishoujo Muzai♡Pirates' by Houshou Marine.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Do-ki-do-ki, rouge?
[Let's go!]
[Innocent! Innocent! Beautiful Girl Innocent!]
[Marine! Marine! Marine is Innocent!]
[Just as I thought, glittering, more and more dizzying]
[Hey, you said it, didn't you?]
[That age doesn't matter at all]
[And that you'd love me including those annoying parts]
[Hey, hey, you said it, didn't you? You didn't?]
[Hmm, is that what you're saying?]
[By the way, on this ship]
[Beautiful Girl Innocence is applied, you know?]
[Leave it to me! Rejuvenation with magic]
[My secret face is only for you]
[Is that special?]
[Ah... I'm troublesome]
[Ah... I can't have fun at the harbor lately]
[I feel like I want to make it a treasure island]
[Set sail!!]
[Cute is Justice, Beautiful Girl Innocence]
[Aiming to be your number one, Yo-soro!]
[Honestly I lack confidence but I'll do my best]
[Ahoy!!]
[Kyu-kyu-kyurun]
[Kyu-kyu-kyurunrun]
[Feeling of being in love, 17 years old]
[It becomes 0 o'clock, adult time]

[Do-ki-do-ki, rouge?]
[It's still too early]
[Is it no good?]

[Because, because]
[I want to try becoming a magical girl]

[My path is toward that star]
[A little bit of lack of assertiveness?]
[After all, you want younger girls too?]
[I'll do anything so]
[Don't abandon me, you guys!]
[I want to see your good points!]
[Ah... sometimes I get sullen]
[Ah... is that still okay?]
[It's my age, I'll get serious]
[Even through the storm]
[Let's go together?]
[Set sail!!]
[Charm on my heart, Beautiful Girl Innocence]
[Hey, what's wrong?]
[Saying it's troublesome]
[I like you who still cares for me]
[Ahoy!!]
[Kyu-kyu-kyurun]
[Kyu-kyu-kyurunrun]
[Please be kind to me, 17 years old]
[Dive in for the experience, enjoy it]

[Ah, forgive me!]
[This Marine's...]
[Charisma! Magic power! Irresistible force!]
[A "sinful woman", huh?]
[Don't let go, hold on]
[I'll show you how vast the world is!]
